description: MCP for ARES, the Czech business registry: lookup, due diligence, insolvency, signed provenance
name: io.github.milos106/ares-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional Ed25519 private key (base64 PKCS#8 DER) to enable signed provenance envelopes. Omit to run unsigned.
environmentVariables.name: ARES_PROVENANCE_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional key id advertised in signed envelopes and the JWKS. Defaults to a thumbprint of the public key.
environmentVariables.name: ARES_PROVENANCE_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Optional override of the ARES REST base URL (defaults to the public ares.gov.cz endpoint).
environmentVariables.name: ARES_BASE_URL

title: ARES (Czech business registry)
